name: Venom
description:
Venom is a Maliwan SMG variant that always spawns with a fixed elemental Maliwan barrel. This gives it above-average elemental damage over time and a strong status effect chance for its level. With a Maliwan grip, those elemental bonuses can be even higher.

Although it is not a top-tier rarity, its reliable elemental procs can carry fights well until you replace it with a rarer or better-suited weapon.
notes:
Related Maliwan fixed-element SMGs include Provacateur (incendiary), Vexation (shock), Revenant (slag), and Hyperborean (cryo).

There is a parts-generation quirk for this set: some blue-rarity guns display purple title text on the item card (and can show as [Purple] in Colourblind Mode). As a result, blue and purple versions with matching parts can end up with identical stats.

Dropped at random from any appropriate loot source.
